memoryArtifacts.description: This is an 1803 painting of the Castle where Mary Sinclair and Henry Sinclair were born .  It from the East, by Julius Caesar Ibbetson. It was call Roslyn Castle.

associatedMedia.headline: Cowthally Castle, Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
Cowthally Castle, view of a ruined overgrown castle with remnants of a round tower to the left, on a hill-top with a stream running into the foreground to right, a spire among trees in the distance to right and mountains in the background; illustration to Scott's edition of Somerville's 'Memorie of the Somervilles ...'. 1815
Print made by: Richard Rhodes

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle於1376年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，她的父親Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney32歲，母親Jean Haliburton18歲。她於1397年與Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville在蘇格蘭培爾維姆結婚。她去世在蘇格蘭培爾維姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle was born in 1376, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, was 32 and her mother, Jean Haliburton, was 18. She married Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville in 1397, in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland. She died in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle est née en 1376, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jean Haliburton, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville en 1397, à Weem, Perthshire, Écosse. Elle est décédée à Weem, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle 1376 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney 32 und ihre Mutter Jean Haliburton 18. Sie hat 1397 in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville geheiratet. Sie starb in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle è nata il nel 1376 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jean Haliburton, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville nel 1397, nel Weem, Perthshire, Scotland. Morì nel Weem, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castleが1376年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkneyは32歳，母Jean Haliburtonは18歳であった。1397年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアウィームでThomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somervilleと結婚した。彼女はスコットランドペルスシュアイアウィームで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle(이)가 1376년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean Haliburton(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1397년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 위에서 Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 위에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle nasceu em 1376, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jean Haliburton, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville em 1397, em Weem, Perthshire, Scotland. Ela faleceu em Weem, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle родилась в 1376 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jean Haliburton, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville в 1397 г. в местности вим, пиртшир, Шотландия. Она умерла в местности вим, пиртшир, Шотландия.
